{{Short description|2011 film festival in Berlin, Germany}} {{Use dmy dates|date=August 2020}} {{Infobox film festival | name = 61st Berlin International Film Festival | image = 61BIFFPoster.jpg | caption = Festival poster | opening = ''[[True Grit (2010 film)|True Grit]]'' | closing = ''[[A Separation]]'' | location = [[Berlin]], Germany | founded = 1951 | awards = [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[A Separation]]'' | host = [[Anke Engelke]] | number = 385 films | date = 10–20 February 2011 | website = http://www.berlinale.de | chronology = Berlin International Film Festival | preceded_by = [[60th Berlin International Film Festival|60th]] | followed_by = [[62nd Berlin International Film Festival|62nd]] }} The '''61st''' annual '''[[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' was held from 10 to 20 February 2011,{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2011/01_jahresblatt_2011/01_Jahresblatt_2011.html|title=61ST BERLIN INTERNATIONAL FILM FESTIVAL FEBRUARY 10 - 20, 2011|access-date=10 June 2014|work=berlinale.de| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131029231003/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2011/01_jahresblatt_2011/01_Jahresblatt_2011.html| archive-date=29 October 2013 | url-status= live}} with actress [[Isabella Rossellini]] as the president of the jury.{{cite news |url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-11130680 |title=Isabella Rossellini to head Berlin Film Festival jury |access-date=15 December 2010 |work=BBC News |date=30 August 2010| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20101216080103/http://www.bbc.co.uk/news/entertainment-arts-11130680| archive-date= 16 December 2010 | url-status= live}} The [[Coen Brothers]] film ''[[True Grit (2010 film)|True Grit]]'' opened the festival.{{cite web |url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_7060.html |title=Coen Brothers' True Grit to Open the 61st Berlinale |access-date=15 December 2010 |work=berlinale.de |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20101229025237/http://www.berlinale.de/en/presse/pressemitteilungen/alle/Alle-Detail_7060.html |archive-date=29 December 2010 |url-status=dead }} 300,000 tickets were sold in total during the event, to 20,000 attendees from 116 countries, including 3900 members of the press.{{Cite web|last=Prot|first=Bénédicte|date=4 March 2011|url=http://cineuropa.org/newsdetail.aspx?lang=en&documentID=198322|title=Organisers toast a successful 61st edition|work=Cineuropa|access-date=5 March 2011}} The [[Golden Bear]] was awarded to the Iranian film ''[[A Separation]]'', directed by [[Asghar Farhadi]], which also served as the closing film at the festival.{{Cite web|last=Smith|first=Nigel|date=18 January 2011|url=http://www.indiewire.com/article/61st_berlinale_locks_down_full_2011_competition_programme|title=61st Berlinale Locks Down Full 2011 Competition Program|work=Indiewire|access-date=11 October 2014}} German actor [[Armin Mueller-Stahl]] received the [[Golden Bear#Golden Bear – Honorary Award|Honorary Golden Bear]] for lifetime achievement. ==Juries== ===Main Competition=== The following people were announced as being on the jury for the festival:{{cite web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2011/04_jury_2011/04_jury_2011.html |title=JURIES 2011 |access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20131023083257/http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2011/04_jury_2011/04_jury_2011.html| archive-date=23 October 2013 | url-status= live}} * [[Isabella Rossellini]], Italian actress - Jury President * [[Jan Chapman]], Australian producer * [[Nina Hoss]], German actress * [[Aamir Khan]], Indian actor, director, screenwriter and producer * [[Guy Maddin]], Canadian director and screenwriter * [[Sandy Powell (costume designer)|Sandy Powell]], British costume designer In addition, the festival held a place open in the jury for the imprisoned Iranian director [[Jafar Panahi]], "to signalize its support for his struggle for freedom". === Best First Feature Award === * Bettina Brokemper, German producer * [[Assaf Gavron]], Israeli writer and musician * [[Michèle Ohayon]], Morocco director, screenwriter and producer === Short Film Competition === * [[Nan Goldin]], American photographer * Ibrahim web|url=http://www.berlinale.de/en/archiv/jahresarchive/2011/03_preistrger_2011/03_preistraeger_2011.html |title=PRIZES & HONOURS 2011|access-date=10 June 2014 |work=berlinale.de| Köhler (director)|Ulrich Köhler]] for ''[[Sleeping Sickness (film)|Sleeping Sickness]]'' * [[Silver Bear for Best Actress]]: the actress ensemble of ''[[Nader and Simin, A Separation]]'' * [[Silver Bear for Best Actor]]: the actor ensemble of ''[[Nader and Simin, A Separation]]'' * Outstanding Artistic Contribution (Production Design): Barbara Enriquez for ''[[The Prize (2011 film)|The Prize]]''
